zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Prescott於1100年出生在英國素可阿盧德爾時，他的父親Sir John Prescott27歲，母親Ann17歲。他於大約1125年與Martha Ishman在英國英格蘭爾達頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1179年在英國英格蘭爾鄧翰 梅西享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: Prescott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so called, in southwestern Lancashire (now Merseyside), Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire, Shropshire, and Devon, all of which are named from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + cot ‘cottage’, ‘dwelling’. The surname is most common in Lancashire, and so it seems likely that the first of these places is the most frequent source. It is also present in Ireland, being recorded there first in the 15th century.

History: John Prescott of Standish, Lancaster, England, arrived in NewEngland in 1640 and in 1643 was one of the first settlers ofLancaster, MA. His descendants include several prominent Americans ofthe revolutionary war, including Samuel Prescott, born in Concord, MA,in 1751, whose fame lies in completing the midnight ride of warning in1775 after Paul Revere was captured.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Prescott was born in 1100, in Arundel, Sussex, England, his father, Sir John Prescott, was 27 and his mother, Ann, was 17. He married Martha Ishman about 1125, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1179, in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Prescott est né en 1100, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Prescott, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ann, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Martha Ishman environ 1125, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1179, à Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Prescottが1100年にイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父Sir John Prescottは27歳，母Annは17歳であった。約1125年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンでMartha Ishmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1179年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダンハム マセイで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Prescott(이)가 1100년 영국 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Prescott(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1125년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 Martha Ishman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1179년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 던함 마시에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Prescott родился в 1100 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Prescott было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha Ishman около 1125 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1179 г. в местности дунам масси, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.
